Tolan's Darkwood Bracer  
 


Slot: WRIST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 14
Effect: Summon Arrows (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 15.0) at Level 45
WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL
Class: RNG
Race: ALL except IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Charges: Unlimited

WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

got mine today
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2009 at 1:29 PM Rating: Decent

got this today 4hr camp brogg was easy he does summon and hes on a 25min spawn timer he popped 4 times in 4 hrs...4th times a charm
▲ Page top
Tolan's DW Bracer summons 100 arrows
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2005 at 12:39 PM Rating: Decent
Philliden
Scholar
200 posts
Major woot! Tolan's Bracer now summons a stack of 100 arrows per cast. I used Bloody Ancille's Pouch up until this time for one major factor...cast time. But now, how the worm has turned. Ancille's is still 20 arrows per cast while bracer is 100.

Ancille's Pouch:

Cast time: 5 seconds
Arrows: 20
Time to summon 100 arrows: 25 seconds
Component: Purified Crystal
Component cost: 10pp per stack
Arrow damage: 1 Range: 50

Tolan's DW Bracer

Cast time: 15 seconds
Arrows: 100
Time to summon 100 arrows: 15 seconds
Component: NONE
Arrow damage: 3 Range: 50

So now, the bracer summons a stack of arrows (100) more quickly, is component free and arrows do 3 times the damage.

The only drawback is the "Temporary" status of bracer arrows. No biggie. Just summon what you think you'll need. If you run out, no biggie, summon more. If you have some left over, no biggie, summon more when you log back in.

Of course you can't use the bracer until level 45, so Ancille's pouch will serve until then. But since the bracer now summons a stack of 100, the bracer now becomes desirable from level 45 until you get EQ.

▲ Page top
info.
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2005 at 11:38 AM Rating: Decent

7 posts
cant use it till level 45,
normally sells for 9k-20k on BB server,

i didnt use my bow much except for keeping up

question back then, just used a Bloody Ancille's Pouch till i got EQ and now i only need 1 arrow.
Plus the Cast time is poo....

# Mar 02 2004 at 1:54 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591768191932
View User Forum
Sage
118 posts
Yup.... same thing happened to me. Just got my level 46 this week and pulled this out of the bank and dusted it off. Its a long cast time but its made life sooooo much easier! Now those Snow Griffins that were invincible to my old regular arrows are going to pay! : o

Theres nothing worse the shelling out big plat for something only to find out you have to wait 15 more levels to use it!! In MOST casses you can look it up here to find that out but not ALL cases as this one proves.

Hang tight this one is worth the wait!

Happy hunting!!

Tolan Bracer of Elusivness
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2003 at 9:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761217228
12 posts
Spent 13 hours camping Brogg with my 62 chanter and a 65 druid. After 10 hours Brogg finally spawned and I was drooling finally my ranger is going to have one. Carefully reaching to pick up my bracer what I do I find a friggin shield whats a shield going to do for a damage dealing, bow carrying Ranger. Bahh was ready to log and quit EQ forever LOL. Made the rounds of our camp pickler commander and disco and back and wow there is Brogg again. Got the bracer this time and the next round popped again and another bracer. This is a long camp and typical of EQ days may go by where a mob doesn't spawn or he may spawn 20 times in a row.

Even though Kunark came out ages ago, these are still pretty rare to see auctioned on Drinal (I just sat up 8 hours trying to buy one in bazaar/Marketchannel). The idea of going to sebilis LFG is slowing dying out too, at least on drinal. Its mainly one of those "bring your own group" dungeons now. No clue as to the drop rate, never have gotten a group over on that side of seb, but apparently the people that have looted them, don't seem to be turning them loose yet. Guess it's time to round up the guild and try to get one in person.

# Jun 03 2002 at 5:18 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771905298
12 posts
Heheh.. Skip the Fleeting Quiver and just go quest the Jeweled Quiver of the Hand. Quest info is available on this site and its SUPAH easy to get, kill one level 45 mob in Katta and take a letter from him to an NPC in Sanctus. Done, thats it, Finito.

Jewelled Quiver is 6 slot 35% haste to bow and I think it was 0 weight as well.

Streak Moonchaser
46th Ranger of Tunare
Brell Serilis
▲ Page top
RE: 7 hour Camp
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2003 at 9:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175456462
5 posts
it's a 35% weight reduction, not haste, haste on a quiver is 1/3 weight reduction. quiver of the hand about 11% haste, fleeting around 20%
▲ Page top
RE: 7 hour Camp
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2003 at 4:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361898660
10 posts
Granted, the Jewelled Quiver is nice, but it's only a bow delay reduction of about 3.5. Fleeting quiver is about 6 and just as easy to get now in the Bazaar (if not easier). BTW, the weight is not 0 but 0.4 (close); it's the same as the fleeting quiver.

▲ Page top
I love this thing!!
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2002 at 5:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775842294
9 posts
OK, to put an end to the bs on this string, here it is. stats are ac14 with right click effect of summon arrows. arrow stats are dmg3 rng 50, and you have to be lvl 45 to use. The cast time is 15.0, so make as much as you need before a fight. This is an awesome piece of gear because i was dropping almost 30pp each time i had to make arrows like this. This is something with a effect that you will actually use as a ranger, unlike a lot of things which give crap buffs etc for this level.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 05 2002 at 10:47 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 50 Range Arrows are good? For what, picking your teeth? My bow's range is 150. Why would I want 50 Range Arrows?
RE: I love this thing!!
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2002 at 12:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361686247
32 posts
Total range for on archery is bow range plus arrow range. So if you have a 150 range bow with 50 range arrows you have a total range of 200. That is already at around the maximum range for the long range spells, and plenty long enough for kiting.
▲ Page top
RE: I love this thing!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 9:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764258695
8 posts
...because if you are bow kiting or sitting back plunking arrows instead of melee, 50 range is fine. These are free arrows to be used when you are out of higher damaging ones with longer range anyhow. Do you realize how many arrows you can use when fighting this way? It is hard to carry enough components with every available bag slot. heh I have never had any problems pulling, bow kiting or anything with 50 range arrows. You just have to stay focused on what you are doing. :)
▲ Page top
RE: I love this thing!!
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2003 at 11:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592342702400
295 posts
/agree

Get a nice PoP bow, they are rather cheap now. For whatever reason, I got a Twisted Longbow (32/38, +2 magic dmg) for 4k, when NMW compound are going for 5k. Still, both are getting up towards 200 range, which is plenty enough for just about anything, even with zero range arrows. 200 range is more than enough for bow kiting, as much further and you're too far for buffs and heals.

This is a fine Bracer. Im in the mood to get one. Ive seen them for sale in Ec for 6-7k. Ive been told that the casting time is very long. and a 3dam 50rng magic arrow 1stack at a time is well worth it. Plus you can, if your bored make them by the truck load and hand them out to newbies." what i dont mind doing" Hook this puppy up with a haste quiver, 30 40 bow, Trueshot disk. Im goina be one bad *** *****. )

Applejuce Tolanheart
48th Ranger
Seekers Of Lore
Inny server

oh. yea I know I got 7 more lvls to get trueshot.
But by the time I do the archery skill will be maxed, and the newbies will be happy
